CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Laurence Vinocur's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Streamlight, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order/judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Continued To Jun-21-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment is continued to June 21, 2018 per the agreement of the parties by email dated 5/31/18. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =(302/HEK)
